notificationSettings.useCustomNotificationsDescription: Enable individual notification defaults for this project

screenshotSettings.useCustomSettingsDescription: Enable individual screenshot settings for this project
screenshotSettings.maxScreenshotSizeDescription: Maximum allowed size for captured screenshots (1-50 MB)
screenshotSettings.maxImageUploadSizeDescription: Maximum allowed size for uploaded images (1-50 MB)
screenshotSettings.maxVideoUploadSizeDescription: Maximum allowed size for uploaded videos (1-500 MB)
screenshotSettings.useScreenCaptureAPIDescription: Enable browser Screen Capture API for pixel-perfect screenshots
screenshotSettings.domCaptureDescription: Captures the page without requiring user permission. Fast, seamless, and works for most layouts. Does not capture videos, canvas, or WebGL content accurately.
screenshotSettings.screenCaptureAPIDescription: Enable for websites (WordPress, Wix, etc.) that load stylesheets or fonts from external domains (CDNs, Google Fonts, etc.). These cross-origin resources cannot be captured automatically, resulting in missing fonts and blank images. Also captures videos, canvas, and WebGL. The browser will prompt the user for permission before each capture.

storage.storageSettingsDescription: Configure where uploaded files are stored.
storage.localDescription: Store files on the local filesystem
storage.s3Description: Store files in S3-compatible object storage
storage.usePathStyleDescription: Enable for MinIO and other S3-compatible storage
storage.migrationDescription: Migrate existing files from one storage backend to another.
storage.migrationWarning: This will copy all files from the current storage to the new storage. This process runs in the background and may take a while for large datasets.
storage.storageSettingsTitleDescription: Configure S3-compatible storage for screenshots and attachments
storage.enableS3StorageHint: Use S3-compatible storage instead of local filesystem
storage.bucketNameHint: The name of your S3 bucket
storage.regionHint: AWS region or S3-compatible service region
storage.accessKeyIdHint: Your AWS access key ID or equivalent
storage.secretAccessKeyHint: Your AWS secret access key or equivalent
storage.customEndpointHint: For S3-compatible services (MinIO, DigitalOcean Spaces, etc.). Leave blank for AWS S3.
storage.storageMigrationDescription: Migrate existing files from local storage to S3
storage.deleteLocalAfterUploadHint: Removes files from local storage after successful S3 upload
storage.deleteWarning: Warning: Local files will be permanently deleted after upload. Make sure you have backups!
storage.alreadyMigrated: All files are already stored in S3. No migration needed.
storage.cliAlternative: Alternative: You can also migrate files using the CLI:
storage.s3StoragePromptDescription: Store screenshots and attachments in S3-compatible object storage. Supports AWS S3, MinIO, DigitalOcean Spaces, and more.

security.securitySettingsDescription: Configure security settings for your BugPin instance.
security.allowRegistrationDescription: Allow new users to register an account
security.csrfDescription: Enable CSRF token validation for API requests
security.widgetRateLimitDescription: Maximum number of widget submissions per hour per IP
security.apiRateLimitDescription: Maximum number of API requests per minute per user
security.securitySettingsTitleDescription: Configure rate limiting and session settings
security.enforceHttpsHint: Redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS and enable HSTS header
security.httpsProxyWarning: Requires a TLS-terminating reverse proxy. Your proxy must set the x-forwarded-proto header. Without proper proxy configuration, this setting will not provide HTTPS protection.
security.rateLimitInfo: Rate limiting helps prevent abuse by limiting the number of requests from a single IP address. This applies globally to all projects.
security.rateLimitHint: Maximum number of API requests allowed per minute from a single IP address (1-1000)
security.sessionDurationHint: Number of days before a user session expires and requires re-login (1-365)
security.invitationExpirationHint: Number of days before an invitation link expires (1-30)

system.applicationNameHint: Used as the sender name in email notifications
system.applicationUrlHint: Used for generating links in email notifications and GitHub issues
system.dataRetentionHint: Time to keep bug reports before automatic deletion. (1-3650 days) Set to 0 to never delete.
system.checkForUpdatesHint: When enabled, BugPin checks GitHub once a day for new releases and shows a banner to administrators when an update is available.

testWidget.title: Test Widget
testWidget.description: Test the BugPin widget on a sample page.
testWidget.enterApiKeyDescription: Please enter your BugPin project API key to test the widget. You can find this in your project details.
testWidget.errorCaptureTestingHint: Click these buttons to generate errors that will be captured in bug reports.
testWidget.userActivityDemoHint: Click these elements to generate activity trail entries. All clicks are tracked and will appear in the bug report.
testWidget.storageKeysDemoHint: Test storage data has been automatically set. These keys will appear in bug reports.

globalSettings.notificationDefaultsDescription: Configure default notification settings for all users and projects.
globalSettings.notificationDefaultsLong: Default notification preferences for all team members across all projects. Individual users can override these in their notification settings. Projects can also override these in their project settings.
globalSettings.reporterNotificationsLong: Default notification preferences for bug reporters. Projects can override these in their project settings.
globalSettings.reporterNotificationsDescription: Configure notification settings for bug reporters.
globalSettings.screenshotSettingsDescription: Configure screenshot capture settings for the bug report widget.
globalSettings.widgetDialogSettingsDescription: Customize the appearance of the feedback widget dialog.
globalSettings.widgetLauncherButtonSettingsDescription: Customize the appearance and behavior of the widget launcher button.
